title: aeschynanthus rejieae
intro: Aeschynanthus rejieae, also known as the lipstick plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. It is native to the tropical forests of the Philippines and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever and respiratory issues. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used in herbal preparations such as infusions and decoctions, which are believed to have health benefits like reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Furthermore, Aeschynanthus rejieae is also used to make herbal teas, tinctures, and salves, which are employed to alleviate various health conditions.
